# AI 与科技热点简报 - 2026年03月19日

## AI 领域热点

### OpenAI & ChatGPT

**[Does your brand need a ChatGPT app? Here is what to consider](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMihgFBVV95cUxQUWNwWm5lOWhQa0RJWnV2aXBYSmg3OFZ6Vk5WNmdqR2VkYXVPNWNKZkNVNEIxNEprVmlMNzlrQ2ZFVk9ZNDQ2dDFidTJjcjRCRDE2czRfS1RVa2VhWExEa2VPbTVndjZnRENDakY5LVVtbHpCVXNGdnAycVJzUzZERWhHalRmdw?oc=5)**
- **摘要**: ChatGPT品牌应用战略分析，探讨企业是否需要开发ChatGPT应用。
- **来源**: Ad Age | 日期: 2026-03-19

**[Why Walmart and OpenAI Are Shaking Up Their Agentic Shopping Deal](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiiwFBVV95cUxNMC05MExiVXJDMEtRcUVpeUhYRHVHLXBpOWpmUzV5MmlIV3FxbUNZMlZRYVloWm5yMHI5Z1c5QzdWdG1qelkzMl9PM1VVdWVrc0lyUVZwVElseFdTd1F1dVB6TEFOLVZVcFJlYktDaHk3Z3FJSHBZX0NrLWtfMjgwY2w2bWpRQlNmWDhF?oc=5)**
- **摘要**: OpenAI与沃尔玛合作调整代理购物协议，推动AI购物助手商业化落地。
- **来源**: WIRED | 日期: 2026-03-18

**[The ChatGPT bug exposed more private data than previously thought, OpenAI confirms](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMihwFBVV95cUxNa0hGUnN5SDFySGV2eGhleVZKYVdUVW9WTHprNkJ1NUNXR1pGRUhLRnZRbU1jb3dqeFRkNG5xNlROSkFiZUZuTmw2aEwyejRkeFpjZHROeVFNQXZURHN1SWhCYl9hTU9VNC1CSmx6SWRRRjF5N3VwT2htTFd3RVltSERVYnlVTjQ?oc=5)**
- **摘要**: OpenAI确认ChatGPT隐私漏洞影响范围超预期，涉及用户数据安全问题。
- **来源**: Mashable | 日期: 2026-03-18

**[The dictionaries are suing OpenAI for 'massive' copyright infringement](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMikgFBVV95cUxPZGRXOUdQZjBuVGdsRTNSX21MQ3JZOWhXcnZkeTEzMF9jTWdsUl9MaHNxNllURk81bFNKajhvSGM0c1RQbFlOOXJkZnJSYkU4dGF2ZXFHTnk2SEgzcERocnNkQmhSV1dxOWxIVS1JczVmMW9QYnZXalpDQ2JKLTJ5aEc0VjZEaUJ0aS1UbGkzUnRQZw?oc=5)**
- **摘要**: 词典出版商起诉OpenAI大规模版权侵权，指控ChatGPT损害其收入。
- **来源**: Fortune | 日期: 2026-03-18

### Anthropic & Claude

**[Microsoft Copilot Cowork explained: How it differs from Anthropic's Claude Cowork](https://news.google.?oc=5)**
- **摘要**: Anthropic Claude Cowork与Microsoft Copilot Cowork对比分析。
- **来源**: MSN | 日期: 2026-03-19

**[Anthropic's Claude claws its way towards the top of the AI market](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMieEFVX3lxTE5kNUI4Qkt3TkZ3WC1mMGcxQ184ZUFBMDdJNzNZM2oteFZwN3RabTV5cjNXdFZrTF9GU1o0X3V3TUNhWWxMR09sTnB0MWxKUnZyZzZ1UWZoZ041anVGX0lSZ1hNUmhMZlJubEpvUjRZZklub0EwU1k5MQ?oc=5)**

**[US: Pentagon labels AI company Anthropic a supply chain risk](https://news.google.?oc=5)**
- **摘要**: 美国五角大楼将Anthropic列为供应链风险企业，引发行业关注。
- **来源**: DW.com | 日期: 2026-03-18

**[Anthropic's 'Claude Dispatch' feels straight out of sci-fi](https://news.google.?oc=5)**
- **摘要**: Anthropic发布Claude Dispatch新功能，可自动化完成办公任务。
- **来源**: The Times of India | 日期: 2026-03-19

**[BMG Sues Anthropic for Alleged Training of Chatbot With Justin Bieber, Bruno Mars, Rolling Stones Lyrics](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMitAFBVV95cUxPOHpydXFLSkdGMVB1YnhCSG1OX05TOEZzQzcyRWdaU3hOVldKTkgtX0ZMcWJ0TWxudWJadWtTWTZkc1JCcXdqN1pkZXdQUUJiOXRaak9CUUs2QjFUblJzT3d5eTZyYUZCVlNMUER0VUh1dTdNRk9CeFBtbEtjc0N5MUdEbmpTRmk0a0RuMzl5cGQzdl81N1l0Y2o4M1BKcno0anRjWm1sMzBQTHZkM0d5ZUpraGY?oc=5)**
- **摘要**: BMG音乐集团起诉Anthropic，指控其使用受版权保护的歌词训练聊天机器人。
- **来源**: Rolling Stone | 日期: 2026-03-18

### AI 安全与研究

**[Breakingviews - How the energy shock could derail the AI boom](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMinwFBVV95cUxPMlY5eElsMkpoaDFzUWxodlNQdUQycWxFdjJtTEVmQ1FVeVRxeVNtdTJjUFlTVVhwZE5zNUo0S1h2UzdjQ29yOU1xOVNnb3drUEFHX3F1Q1FxLXJ3MXpaVVN3OEVYRkRjZW1PSm1UZWJSTTd2czY0cjJudDJMVGI3NXVNd1U3N1ltRFp2QjFiZ1RPRkp6S0RhOWtBbDhiUW8?oc=5)**

**[Explainer: Network traffic is fundamentally changing in the AI supercycle](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiuwFBVV95cUxNMGhXamxxTU5Mb3lTZkI0Ul8yUzZteG4yRDhsNGswa19UY0twelFObHdXeGZiNElYVlJ6QWY5Zi1DUVVLdlVqM2hLdzI5V3JjSmZtRTFlVTVuMFE5bmpsaWxDRlhlNGdqU21TWWZMN1F6bWVLVW4xd082WGZTcUZkcW5rVFB2eUpaRkpURncxbnFfQnVycHFYaGtXRV9LX1V4THB6c1Z3Y0J6dVN3ZkZfQkV6TGp2S0d5UFdZ?oc=5)**

- **来源**: Nokia | 日期: 2026-03-19

**[Artificial intelligence-guided design of LNPs for in vivo targeted mRNA delivery](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE0tdk5jLXk3RlAtSFQxclYzb3ZHY0VBY3ZJODh4MXZ3bEU4ZnBzYlU2dDlacERXVHhRTmZ2ZkUyQ3VlWEJ5bkdqUjFxQ2JDZzlFRnpnaWNWczQ0V21CMEdz?oc=5)**
- **摘要**: 人工智能引导的脂质纳米颗粒设计，用于靶向mRNA递送。
- **来源**: Nature | 日期: 2026-03-19

**[How AI is actually changing day-to-day work](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiigFBVV95cUxPWXRsc3BvallGOWFmLUVsTGlPb2R3b3VKRjZyTlpvSnJISENiQW5EcE5uN2h0TEV2bGg0aHdZVzVHS1FuQTQ3ZUhONDlaZGp1eVhIaUxDaWxMN3FyRTd4T3B0dnczN1BEbEsyVHhGVnVYcWpRV2ZZbTR1QUVoZlNsd1JVMWd4VVVVa0E?oc=5)**
